query: An equity analyst wants to review Apple's recent annual performance trend. Retrieve the latest 3 annual income statements for Apple.
A portfolio manager is checking Microsoft's short-term financial position. Show the latest 4 quarterly balance sheets for Microsoft.
An investor wants to inspect Tesla's recent cash generation. Fetch the latest 3 annual cash flow statements for Tesla.
Before placing a trade, a user wants the current stock price of Nvidia. What is Nvidia's current stock price?
A trader is reviewing Tesla's price action over a specific month. Retrieve daily stock prices for Tesla from 2025-01-01 to 2025-01-31.
A news desk is compiling a quick Apple briefing. Show recent company news for Apple.
A compliance reviewer needs Apple's recent annual reports. List the latest 5 10-K filings for Apple.
An analyst wants a forward-looking view on Apple. Retrieve the latest 3 annual analyst estimates for Apple.
A valuation team is reviewing Microsoft's latest reported ratios over time. Show the latest 4 quarterly financial metrics for Microsoft.
An investor needs a quick fundamentals snapshot before comparing chipmakers. What is the latest financial metrics snapshot for Nvidia?
A market researcher wants to inspect Tesla's business mix. Retrieve the latest 2 annual segmented revenues for Tesla.
Before extracting a section from a filing, an analyst wants to see which 10-K sections are supported. List the available filing items for 10-K filings.
A fundamental analyst needs the Risk Factors section from Apple's annual report. Extract the Risk Factors item from Apple's 10-K filed on 2024-11-01.
A researcher needs a concise company profile for Microsoft. Retrieve company facts for Microsoft.
